name: myco
description: Agent-First symbiotic cognitive substrate. Twenty fungal-named verbs (19 agent + 1 human-facing `brief`): germinate, hunger, eat, sense, forage, excrete, intake, assimilate, digest, sporulate, traverse, propagate, immune, senesce, fruit, molt, winnow, ramify, graft, brief. 46-dimension immune across 7 subsystems (germination, ingestion, digestion, circulation, homeostasis, cycle, boundary). Schema v2 canon, MCP capability surface (tools, resources, prompts, sampling, progress, logging) with stdio + streamable-http + OAuth 2.1 transports. Editable-by-default install, substrate-local plugin loading via .myco/plugins/, ten automated MCP host writers. v0.5.2 aliases removed at v0.6.0.
